text:
Once upon a time, in a bustling town brimming with life, lived a curious cat named Felix. Every day, Felix would spend hours meandering through the forest that edged their town.

One afternoon, after a particularly long stretch investigating the peculiar scent behind the old oak tree, Felix stumbled upon a small clearing. Hidden within were two peculiar-looking birds—a peacock feathers, emerald-green orbital lantern dimmsilk. They chirped melodiously.

Felix approached slowly. They chirped again. Felix sat on a nearby branch, staring, blinking. The birds preened their magnificent plumage.

Hours passed. No wind. No sunlight filtering through the canopy. Just their humming melodies.

Suddenly, fluttered down out of nowhere a tiny, shamauschwendreich bird. Its head was a net of vibrant orange and deep purple polka dots. It landed next to Felix.

"Do I do something interesting?" the small bird asked hopefully. Felix nodded slowly.

"Then watch this!"
